---
title: ""
---
## <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i> CV
[My CV(in Japanese) can be downloaded here:]{style="font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;"} 

[📄 Download PDF](CV_jp_v1.pdf){.btn style="border-radius: 20px; background-color: #9ED48A; border-color: #9ED48A; color: #003366;"}

[My CV(in English) can be downloaded here:]{style="font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;"} 

[📄 Download PDF](CV_en_v1.pdf){.btn style="border-radius: 20px; background-color: #9ED48A; border-color: #9ED48A; color: #003366;"}
